zh.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler是John Chandler的兒子，於1588年12月20日出生在英國米德萊可。他於1610年與Elizabeth Alden在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1632年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加並於1622年住在荷蘭霍蘭萊登且於1632年住在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯。他去世於1662年6月2日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler是John Chandler的儿子，于1588年12月20日出生在英国米德萊可。他于1610年与Elizabeth Alden在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1632年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加并于1622年住在荷兰霍蘭萊登且于1632年住在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯。他去世于1662年6月2日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.description: Britain waged wars against the Dutch.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: "English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler was born on 20 December 1588, in Middlesex, England as the son of John Chandler. He married Elizabeth Alden in 1610, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He immigrated to British Colonial America in 1632 and lived in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands in 1622 and Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States in 1632. He died before 2 June 1662, in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler est né le 20 décembre 1588, à Middlesex, Angleterre, fils de John Chandler. Il a épousé Elizabeth Alden en 1610, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il a immigré au Amérique coloniale britannique en 1632 et a vécu à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas en 1622 et à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1632. Il est décédé avant 2 juin 1662, à Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler wurde am 20. Dezember 1588 in Middlesex, England, als Sohn von John Chandler geboren. Er hat 1610 in London, Middlesex, England Elizabeth Alden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er ist 1632 nach British Colonial America eingewandert. 1622 hat er in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande und 1632 in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb vor 2. Juni 1662 in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler è nato il il 20 dicembre 1588 nel Middlesex, England come figlio di John Chandler. Lui sposato Elizabeth Alden nel 1610, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Immigrato nel British Colonial America nel 1632 e vissuto a Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi nel 1622 e nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1632. Morì prima del 2 giugno 1662, nel Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandlerは1588年12月20日にイギリスミッドレセックスでJohn Chandlerの息子として生まれた。1610年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでElizabeth Aldenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1632年にイギリス植民地アメリカに移住し，1622年にはオランダホーランドレイデンに，1632年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスプリモウスに住んでいた。彼は1662年6月2日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーダクスブリーで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーダクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler(은)는 1588년 12월 20일 영국 미들레세스에서 John Chandler의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1610년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Elizabeth Alden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1632년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아로 이민을 떠났고, 1622년도에 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서, 1632년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 플림우스에서 살았다. 그는 1662년 6월 2일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler nasceu em 20 de dezembro de 1588, em Middlesex, Inglaterra filho de John Chandler. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Alden em 1610, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele imigrou para o British Colonial America em 1632 e viveu em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos em 1622 e em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1632. Ele faleceu antes 2 de junho de 1662, em Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler родился 20 декабря 1588 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия. Его отца звали John Chandler. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Alden в 1610 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в бритиш колоняль амирика в 1632 году, а также жил в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды в 1622 году и в местности плимоут, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1632 году. Он умер перед 2 июнь 1662 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности дуксбури, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Edmund Chandler nació el 20 de diciembre de 1588, en Middlesex, Inglaterra como hijo de John Chandler. Se casó con Elizabeth Alden en 1610, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Inmigró a British Colonial America en 1632 y vivió en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos en 1622 y en Plymouth, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1632.
